name: Hayato  Ozaki
description: A leader-like existence within the Search Team, he possesses a strong sense of justice. However, because he always speaks his mind, he easily ends up gives others the impression that he is a violent or rude person.

name: Hestia
description: __Height__: 167 cm She used to be an ordinary office worker who one day possessed the body of Hestia, an extra from a novel she liked. She watches the novel without intervening and mourns Cael's suicide a year after the novel reach its completion. When suddenly, she wakes up and see's that she regressed to the point of the novel completion. She uses her knowledge of the original story as a prophetic ability and becomes an aide to the Crown Prince.

name: Huo You
description: __Alternative names:__ ~!Examiner A, Big Examiner (大考官)!~__Height:__ 184cm __Weight:__ 60kg __Ticket Number:__ 860451-10062231-000A

name: Ichiko
description: Member of Mayonaka Punch channel, who lives with the other members inside Banpai Manor, which she has a strong attachment to as a place. She has a childlike demeanor but sees herself as an older sister type.

name: Junichi Katsuragi
description: Sentaro idolized Junichi, whom he affectionately calls "Brother Jun". In fact, the friendship between Junichi, Sentaro, and Ritsuko goes way back to when they were kids. "Brother Jun" goes to college in Tokyo now, but whenever he comes home, he always stops in at Welcome Records and jams on the trumpet, playing jazz with Sentaro and whoever else is around.

name: Kano Ienaga
description: Kano Ienaga is the name assumed by one of the Abashiri Convicts. ~!Her previous name was Chikanobu (親宣). She was a doctor known for torturing her patients. Her motive behind her cannibalism and torture is revealed to be staying young and beautiful.!~

name: Kazuki Muto
description: A 16-year-old boy who attends a private academy with his sister. After becoming involved in Tokiko Tsumura's fight and subsequently being killed and revived by a Kakugane (which later turns out to be a dark Kakugane), he is told to simply return to his ordinary life, but instead insists upon assisting Tokiko in her battles. name: Kotone Fujisaki
description: Kotone Fujisaki was a student at Setouchi Keijo Training School. She was ranked fourth in the Elite Class. Upon graduating from Setouchi, Kotone officially becomes a B-Rank Keijo player, affiliated with the Chugoku's Hiroshima Branch. Sometime later, she is able to advance to the A-Rank.

name: Makoto Okazaki
description: Makoto Okazaki is your run of the mill high-schooler, a perfect bullying target and a closet pervert. One night, on his way to return a DVD to a friend, he notices a person on a nearby rooftop. The person lunges at him and bites his neck, drinking his blood. The attacker, a beautiful girl, then asks him: "Do you want to die or become like me?" He decides to live...

name: Manami Azuma
description: Height: 148 cm Talent: handstands Favorite subject: music, mathematics, biology, PE Least favorite subject: English and history Dislikes: being called croissant Future dream: School teacher A cute and fashionable third-year student. She's in love with her childhood friend, Hayato, and is fiercely protective of him, causing her to have no female friends. Her inner thoughts are often far more rude and sinister than her outward attitude and actions.
